questionHtml: Physical and chemical methods can be used to genetically modify crop plants by inserting new genes. List a physical and a chemical method that could have been used to introduce the gene coding for CTP1 into the rice plants.
markschemeHtml:
a. physical:
electroporation
OR
microinjection
OR
biolistics «gunshot» 

Allow other verifiable answer.

b. chemical:
calcium chloride
OR
liposomes

Allow other verifiable answer.
